entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`key` TEXT NOT NULL, `value` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`key`))

indices.name: index_key_value_key
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_key_value_key` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`key`)
